title: Find My Device - Screen with No Devices Connected
scenario: Verify the "No Devices Connected" screen displays correctly when no devices are connected, showing a map, warning sign, and the expected text and button.
steps: Open Lens App to the "No Devices Connected" screen.
expected: Find My Device screen shows a map, warning sign, and the text "No devices were found. Connect your Poly device using Bluetooth and try again." along with a "Not seeing your device?" button.
